title: Rename type insecureAcceptAnything to accept
body:
Required for pending change in upstream library https://github.com/containers/image/pull/132

Signed-off-by: Aaron Weitekamp aweiteka@redhat.com

comments.body: Don't we need to get this into skopeo before we ship rhel7.3.1?

We need this in https://github.com/containers/image/pull/132 first, then this can go in. We can stage support in [atomic CLI](https://github.com/projectatomic/atomic/blob/master/Atomic/trust.py]) so it will be backwards compatible.
Is this pull request still something we are considering?
At this point I consider skopeo an "expert" tool so I'm okay just mapping this to 'accept' in atomic CLI or any other tools that call/wrap skopeo.
Then can you close this pull request.
